overall_effectiveness_summary.customer_experience_assessment: Brief assessment of overall call quality and customer satisfaction likely outcome. Consider customer context (hardship status, CHI score, call difficulty).
overall_effectiveness_summary.customer_context_notes: Note any hardship status, low CHI, recent complaints, or high call volume that affected call complexity or required sensitivity
primary_strengths: 2-3 specific things the agent did well, noting any top performer phrases used
critical_gaps: 2-3 specific areas that prevented better customer experience

priority_coaching_recommendations.coaching_area: Specific skill/technique to improve (e.g., 'Digital deflection - providing step-by-step guidance')
priority_coaching_recommendations.current_approach: EXACT quote(s) from evaluation or transcript - NO PARAPHRASING, NO INVENTION.
priority_coaching_recommendations.ineffectiveness_reason: Clear explanation of why this approach limited effectiveness (customer impact and/or business impact).
priority_coaching_recommendations.recommended_approach: Specific alternative phrasing or technique from top performers
priority_coaching_recommendations.example_implementation: Concrete example: 'Instead of saying X, try: [exact top performer phrase] because...'
priority_coaching_recommendations.expected_impact: How this change would improve customer experience and/or business outcomes

priority_coaching_recommendations.current_approach: EXACT quote(s) from evaluation or transcript - NO PARAPHRASING, NO INVENTION
priority_coaching_recommendations.ineffectiveness_reason: Clear explanation of why this approach limited effectiveness
priority_coaching_recommendations.recommended_approach: Specific alternative phrasing or technique from top performers
priority_coaching_recommendations.example_implementation: Concrete example with specific phrases from phrase library
priority_coaching_recommendations.expected_impact: How this change would improve customer experience and/or business outcomes

priority_coaching_recommendations.coaching_area: Third most important area (only if clearly impactful)
priority_coaching_recommendations.current_approach: EXACT quote(s) from evaluation or transcript - NO PARAPHRASING, NO INVENTION
priority_coaching_recommendations.ineffectiveness_reason: Clear explanation of why this approach limited effectiveness
priority_coaching_recommendations.recommended_approach: Specific alternative phrasing or technique from top performers
priority_coaching_recommendations.example_implementation: Concrete example with specific phrases from phrase library
priority_coaching_recommendations.expected_impact: How this change would improve customer experience and/or business outcomes

positive_behaviors_to_reinforce.why_effective: Explanation of why this approach worked well for customer experience.
positive_behaviors_to_reinforce.encourage_continued_use: Brief note on maintaining/expanding this strength
